title: St. Elijah Orthodox Syrian Church, Koduvila
tagline: St. Elijah Orthodox Syrian Church, Koduvila — spiritual town of Kerala

heroImage.alt: St. Elijah Orthodox Syrian Church, Koduvila, Kerala

overview.short: St. Elijah Orthodox Syrian Church, Koduvila is a much-loved spiritual town in Kerala, known for temples and pilgrimage.
overview.description: St. Elijah Orthodox Syrian Church, Koduvila, is one of the ancient churches of the Malankara Orthodox Church.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Sinkarappally
topPlaces.description: Sinkarappally (koduvila)is a small scenic ward situated between Ashtamudi Lake and Kallada River, on the outskirts of Kollam District in Kerala.

topPlaces.name: West Kallada
topPlaces.description: West Kallada is a village in Kollam district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Munroe Island
topPlaces.description: Munroe Island is an inland island group located at the confluence of Ashtamudi Lake and the Kallada River, in Kollam district, Kerala, South India. It is a group of eight small islets comprising a total area of about 13.4 km2.

topPlaces.name: Kallada River
topPlaces.description: The Kallada River is the longest river in Kollam District, Kerala, India. The river originates in Madathara, in the Western Ghats, and flows west, reaching the Arabian Sea after traveling a distance of 120 km (75 mi).

topPlaces.name: Kizhakkekallada
topPlaces.description: Kizhakkekallada, also known as East Kallada, is a large village in the Kollam district in the state of Kerala, India. It is located about 20 kilometres (12 mi) northeast of Kollam.

topPlaces.name: Koduvila
topPlaces.description: Koduvila is a village near Ashtamudi Lake in East-Kallada, Kollam district, Kerala, India. It shares a boundary with Munroe Island, and is near Chittumala.

topPlaces.name: Kumbalam, Kollam
topPlaces.description: Kumbalam, is a place in Kollam, Kerala, India. It has a population of around 4,000 and is a part of Perayam grama panchayat.

topPlaces.name: Karikuzhi
topPlaces.description: Karikuzhi is a place in Kollam district of Kerala, India. Nearby places are Perayam, Kumbalam, Padappakkara and Kanjiracodu.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit St. Elijah Orthodox Syrian Church, Koduvila?
faq.a: The best time to visit St. Elijah Orthodox Syrian Church, Koduvila is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach St. Elijah Orthodox Syrian Church, Koduvila?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (66 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (67 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for St. Elijah Orthodox Syrian Church, Koduvila?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of St. Elijah Orthodox Syrian Church, Koduvila at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in St. Elijah Orthodox Syrian Church, Koduvila?
faq.a: Stays in St. Elijah Orthodox Syrian Church, Koduvila start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in St. Elijah Orthodox Syrian Church, Koduvila?
faq.a: The top attractions are Sinkarappally, West Kallada, Munroe Island, Kallada River, Kizhakkekallada.
